title: Extraction Protocol for Untargeted LC-MS/MS from Animal Tissues
author: Mauricio Caraballo

steps.title: Methanol, Optima™ LC/MS Grade, Fisher Chemical...
steps.instruction: Methanol, Optima™ LC/MS Grade, Fisher Chemical Fisher Scientific Catalog #A456-4 (CAS: 67-56-

steps.title: Additionally, prepare the following solutions
steps.instruction: Additionally, prepare the following solutions: Extraction solvent: 50% methanol:water → 50:50 v/v of LC grade methanol/ LC grade water. Resuspension solvent (50:50 v/v methanol:water) containing 1uM sulfadimethoxine (CAS 122-11-

steps.title: as an internal standard
steps.instruction: as an internal standard.

steps.title: TissueLyser II (Bead Mill, QIAGEN, 85300, https://www
steps.instruction: TissueLyser II (Bead Mill, QIAGEN, 85300, https://www.qiagen.com/us/products/human-id-and-forensics/automation/tissuelyser-ii/#orderinginformation ) Legend RT (Refrigerated Benchtop Centrifuge, Sorvall, sorvall legend rt, https://knowledge1.thermofisher.com/Lab_Equipment/Centrifuges/Table_Top_Centrifuges/Table_Top_Centrifuge_Operator_Manuals/Sorvall_Legend_T_Plus%2C_RT_Plus_Instruction_Manual ) Centrifuge 5418 (Centrifuge, Eppendorf US, Catalog No. 5401000137, https://www.eppendorf.com/us-en/eShop-Products/Centrifugation/Microcentrifuges/Centrifuge-5418R-p-5401000137 ) Sonicator (Branson, B2510)

steps.title: Liver, stomach and intestine preserved in...
steps.instruction: Liver, stomach and intestine preserved in Ethanol 95% from fish (threespine stickleback, Gasterosteus aculeatus ). Worms (fish parasite) can be extracted following this protocol In case samples were put in tubes without ethanol: Shake (vortex can be used) the tube without touching/manipulation of the samples and transfer to a new empty tube. Transferring beads from the Petri dish or big beaker to the beads dispenser using aluminum foil to cover either of them and to create a small mouth to either the big beaker or the Petri dish to avoid falling of beads.

steps.title: https://animalmicrobiome
steps.instruction: https://animalmicrobiome.biomedcentral.com/articles/10.1186/s42523-022-00182-z https://protocolexchange.researchsquare.com/article/pex-2055/v1

steps.title: This protocol details the preparation of...
steps.instruction: This protocol details the preparation of animal tissue samples for untargeted metabolomics analysis using liquid chromatography-tandem mass spectrometry (LC-MS/MS). It covers sample collection, homogenization, metabolite extraction, and preparation for LC-MS/MS analysis. This protocol can be adapted to other sample types. This is not a final document, not peer-reviewed and it can be updated.

steps.title: Stainless Steel Beads (Qiagen, Inc
steps.instruction: Stainless Steel Beads (Qiagen, Inc., 5 mm diameter, Cat. No. NC

steps.title: Shallow polypropylene 96-well plate (Cat
steps.instruction: Shallow polypropylene 96-well plate (Cat. No.

steps.title: Deep polypropylene 96-well plate (Cat
steps.instruction: Deep polypropylene 96-well plate (Cat. No.

steps.title: Seal plates (Cat
steps.instruction: Seal plates (Cat. No. ZAFPE

steps.title: Note
steps.instruction: Note: for LC-MS/MS acquisition AlumaSeal CS (Sealing Foil, Excel Scientific) (Cat. No. FC

steps.title: Note
steps.instruction: Note: for long time storage Metal tweezers Bead dispenser Wash the stainless steel beads with LC-MS grade water followed by LC-MS methanol in a glass Petri dish then allow to dry overnight.

steps.title: Samples are received in plastic centrifugation...
steps.instruction: Samples are received in plastic centrifugation tubes containing 1mL of 95% Ethanol. If ink labels are inside the tube, carefully remove them using tweezers disinfected with methanol every time. Make sure the tube is labeled from the outside via sticker or marker.

steps.title: Dry samples using Centrivap
steps.instruction: Dry samples using Centrivap.

steps.title: Label empty sample tube
steps.instruction: Label empty sample tube.

steps.title: Add 1 bead with the beads...
steps.instruction: Add 1 bead with the beads dispenser into each empty sample tube.

steps.title: Add 1 mL of extraction solvent (50% methanol:water) per tube
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL of extraction solvent (50% methanol:water) per tube.

steps.title: Homogenize at 30 Hz for 8...
steps.instruction: Homogenize at 30 Hz for 8 min in a Qiagen TissueLyzer II.

steps.title: Allow to extract at 4 °C for 1 h
steps.instruction: Allow to extract at 4 °C for 1 h. This step helps with protein precipitation

steps.title: Centrifuge at 14000 rpm, 4 °C, 15 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 14000 rpm, 4 °C, 15 minutes

steps.title: Transfer at total of 800 uL...
steps.instruction: Transfer at total of 800 uL of supernatant split in 2 labeled deep polypropylene 96-well plates (400 uL for each plate). Label plates before transferring any sample. One of the plates will be used as a backup plate (storage under -80 °C).

steps.title: Dry plates using Centrivap
steps.instruction: Dry plates using Centrivap.

steps.title: Seal plates and store under -80 °C until LC–MS/MS analysis
steps.instruction: Seal plates and store under -80 °C until LC–MS/MS analysis.

steps.title: Prior to LC-MS/MS analysis, reconstitute one...
steps.instruction: Prior to LC-MS/MS analysis, reconstitute one of the plates with 200uL of resuspension solvent (50% methanol/water solution containing 1uM sulfadimethoxine as an internal standard).

steps.title: Seal plate and sonicate 00:15:00
steps.instruction: Seal plate and sonicate 00:15:00

steps.title: Hand-shake or vortex This guarantees complete solubilization of the sample
steps.instruction: Hand-shake or vortex This guarantees complete solubilization of the sample

steps.title: Transfer to a shallow polypropylene 96-well...
steps.instruction: Transfer to a shallow polypropylene 96-well plate If particles or turbid solution are observed, centrifuge plate 2000 rpm, 4 °C, 15 minutes and transfer to a new shallow polypropylene 96-well plate.

steps.title: This shallow polypropylene 96-well plate will...
steps.instruction: This shallow polypropylene 96-well plate will be used for LC-MS/MS acquisition.
